zh.lifeSummary: 當Gemma di Benevento於0940年出生在義大利坎帕尼亞貝尼文托貝尼文托時，她的父親Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento36歲，母親Maria di Gaeta26歲。她於1032年與Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno在義大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1006年10月之後在義大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾薩利爾諾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Gemma di Benevento于0940年出生在意大利坎帕尼亞貝尼文托貝尼文托时，她的父亲Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento36岁，母亲Maria di Gaeta26岁。她于1032年与Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno在意大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1006年10月之后在意大利坎帕尼亞薩利爾諾薩利爾諾。

nameMeanings.name: di
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Mandarin form of the surname 狄, a term referring to the tribes in ancient northern China: (i) from Di (狄), the name of an ancient state (thought to have been located in Hebei or Shandong province), which was granted to Xiao Bo or Kao Bo by King Cheng of Zhou (reigned 1042–1021  BC ). (ii) adopted as a surname by the Ku Di (庫狄) family during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) traced back to other minority ethnic groups in ancient northwestern China.

Mandarin form of the Chinese surname 邸, meaning ‘official residence’ in Chinese: (i) from placename Di (邸), the name of a county (unidentified location). (ii) said to be borne by some descendants of Kujula Kadphises (called 丘就郤 or 邸就郤 in Chinese, 30–c. 80 AD ), founder of the Kushan Empire (one branch of the Yuezhi people originating from western China) located in Central Asia during the Eastern Han dynasty (25–220 AD ).

variants.name: Chi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Young, Dong, Yun, Cheng, Jae, Yong, Cheng Chung, Chi, Chun, Duk, Fang, Feng.  Korean Chung, Chong, Jae Hong, Moon, Myong, Pong, Shen, Yoo, Byung, Chang, Chol, Chong Hun.  Southeast Asian Phi, Hung, Ly, Tu, Denh, Do Van, Duong, Hao, Kieu, Mui, Nga, Phat.

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 池, meaning ‘moat’ in ancient Chinese: (i) acquired as a surname by people who lived beside a moat. (ii) from Chi (池), said to be the name of an ancient state (of unknown location and period). (iii) from the personal name Chi (池), personal name of a son of an official in the state of Qin during the Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ).

Chinese: Mandarin and Cantonese form of the surname 遲, meaning ‘late’ in Chinese: (i) borne by descendants of Chi Ren (遲任), a person who lived during the Shang dynasty (1600–1046  BC ). (ii) shortened form of the Chinese compound surname Yu-Chi (尉遲), originally the name of a tribe from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China. (iii) from the second element of the personal name Zi Chi (子遲), style name of Fan Xu, a student of Confucius (551–479  BC ).

nameMeanings.name: Benevento
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Rocco, Nunzio, Antonio, Concetta, Donato, Enrico, Fiore, Luigi, Marcello, Orazio, Pasquale.
habitational name from the city or province of Benevento in southwestern Italy.

nameMeanings.name: Gemma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a medieval Italian nickname meaning ‘gem, jewel’. It has been chosen in modern times mainly because of its transparent etymology. Among Roman Catholics it is sometimes chosen in honour of  St Gemma Galgani  (  1878–1903 ), who was the subject of many extraordinary signs of grace, such as ecstasies and the appearance of the stigmata. It was extremely popular in the 1980s but has since faded slightly.

en.lifeSummary: When Gemma di Benevento was born in 0940, in Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italy, her father, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, was 36 and her mother, Maria di Gaeta, was 26. She married Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno in 1032, in Salerno, Campania, Italy. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died after October 1006, in Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italy.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Gemma di Benevento est née en 0940, à Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italie, son père, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Maria di Gaeta, avait 26 ans. Elle a épousé Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno en 1032, à Salerno, Campania, Italie. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée après octobre 1006, à Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italie.

de.lifeSummary: Als Gemma di Benevento 0940 in Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento 36 und ihre Mutter Maria di Gaeta 26. Sie hat 1032 in Salerno, Campania, Italien Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb nach Oktober 1006 in Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italien.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Gemma di Benevento è nata il nel 0940 nel Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italia, sua padre, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, aveva 36 anni e sua madre, Maria di Gaeta, aveva 26 anni. Lei sposato Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno nel 1032, nel Salerno, Campania, Italia. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì dopo il ottobre 1006, nel Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italia.

ja.lifeSummary: Gemma di Beneventoが0940年にイタリアカンプアニアベンエベントーベンエベントーで生まれた時，父Landolfo II di Capua e Beneventoは36歳，母Maria di Gaetaは26歳であった。1032年にイタリアカンプアニアサラーノでGisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salernoと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1006年10月以後にイタリアカンプアニアサラーノサラーノで死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Gemma di Benevento(이)가 0940년 이탈리아 캠파니아 베네븐토 베네븐토에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento(은)는 36세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Maria di Gaeta(은)는 26세였다. 그녀는 1032년 이탈리아 캠파니아 살일른오에서 Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1006년 10월 이후 이탈리아 캠파니아 살일른오 살일른오에서 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Gemma di Benevento nasceu em 0940, em Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Itália, seu pai, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Maria di Gaeta, tinha 26 anos. Ela casou-se com Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno em 1032, em Salerno, Campania, Itália. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu após outubro de 1006, em Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Itália.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Gemma di Benevento родилась в 0940 г. в местности бинивенто, бинивенто, кампаня, Италия, её отцу по имени Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Maria di Gaeta, 26. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno в 1032 г. в местности сеилирно, кампаня, Италия. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла после октябрь 1006 г. в местности сеилирно, сеилирно, кампаня, Италия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Gemma di Benevento nació en 0940, en Benevento, Benevento, Campania, Italia, su papá, Landolfo II di Capua e Benevento, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Maria di Gaeta, tenía 26 años. Se casó con Gisulf I di Salerno Prince of Salerno en 1032, en Salerno, Campania, Italia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió después de octubre de 1006, en Salerno, Salerno, Campania, Italia.
